info.title: UOA recurring add-on consumer API
info.description: Exact display-ready recurring add-on API. UOA resolves visibility, manager capabilities, paid entitlement, and cancellation; products only render and relay frozen actions.

post.summary: Read add-on offers and team entitlement status
post.description: The product posts the exact subject bound into X-UOA-Actor. Active exact-team members receive a UOA-filtered display projection. Only billing managers receive enabled subscribe or cancel actions.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

post.summary: Create Checkout for one exact UOA add-on offer
post.description: Products re-fetch the projection and relay the complete frozen action body unchanged. UOA verifies its subject against the app key and actor, then derives idempotency from the exact scope and offer.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

post.summary: Preview cancellation for one exact UOA subscription

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

post.summary: Confirm one still-valid UOA cancellation preview
post.description: Replay-safe through the opaque UOA preview token and UOA-issued idempotency key returned by the preview.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

UoaActor.name: X-UOA-Actor
UoaActor.description: Fresh credential-bound RS256 actor assertion for the exact user/org/team.

BillingRecurringAddonProtocolV1.title: UOA recurring add-on consumer protocol v1
BillingRecurringAddonProtocolV1.description: Exact display model and single-add-on subscription cancellation messages. Runtime entitlements remain UOA-resolved.

BillingRecurringAddonV1Conformance.summary: DeepWater $50 monthly privacy add-on and its exact cancellation flow

viewer.description: This viewer may manage team add-ons and see full entitlement status.

recurring_addons.title: DeepWater add-ons
recurring_addons.description: Optional subscriptions are billed separately from metered usage credits.

offers.name: Private research
offers.description: Keep eligible DeepWater research private for this team.

entitlement.description: UOA resolves the runtime entitlement independently; the product does not infer it from payment state.

actions.label: Subscribe for $50.00/month
actions.description: Open secure Checkout for this exact UOA offer.
actions.disabled_reason: This team already has the add-on.

actions.label: Cancel private research
actions.description: Review when the team entitlement will end before confirming.

viewer.description: This viewer may see their own relationship and the team entitlement status.

recurring_addons_member.title: DeepWater add-ons
recurring_addons_member.description: Optional subscriptions are billed separately from metered usage credits.

offers.name: Private research
offers.description: Keep eligible DeepWater research private for this team.

cancellation_preview.title: Cancel private research?
cancellation_preview.description: Private research remains active until the end of the current billing period.

cancellation_confirmation.title: Cancellation scheduled
cancellation_confirmation.description: Private research remains active until 1 August 2026.
